text.title: Diary Studies Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree from observable signals to a rule-grounded conclusion.

decision-tree.root-question: What time scale does the research question span?

conclusion.verdict: diary study with reminders + dual entry mode

example.trace: sleep behaviour over 2 weeks → 3-30 day band → diary with cadence + dual mode

text.example: Trace through the tree producing the leaf conclusion.
